summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected; each open PR is kept non-mutating because the shard is not a dedupe cluster and the hydrated evidence shows useful standalone work, maintainer review/proof needs, or unresolved checks rather than safe closeout grounds.

actions.reason: Related to the hydrated cron watchdog issue, but this live inventory shard should not invent a shared canonical or close/merge it.
Standalone config fix with proof and maintainer-review gate; not a duplicate, superseded PR, or low-signal closeout candidate.
Standalone agent transport bug fix with useful code; no safe closeout or merge action is available in this plan-mode inventory job.
Useful but not ready contributor PR; unresolved proof/rebase/review-comment blockers make closeout or merge inappropriate, and it is not duplicate of the closed managed-skill prompt-path PR.
Standalone TUI behavior fix with unique reproduction details and remaining proof/rebase needs; not safe for closeout in this inventory shard.
Open linked issue should stay open as related context for #88396; no duplicate or fixed-by-candidate closeout is safe.
Already closed; included only as hydrated context and not eligible for any closure action.
